title: Ubiquiti UF-GP-B+ - U Fiber GPON OLT, Class B+ SFP Module
description: UFiber GPON SFP modul with PN: UF-GP-B+ is designed to GPON slots in OLT unit from Ubiquiti. It is a special SFP module with asymmetric speed 2,5Gbps upload, 1,25Gbps download in direction to clients GPON SFP module has SC connector with UPC grind and 20km range. Transmitting power is 1.5 up to 5dBm , receiving sensitivity is -8 up to -28dBm
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 1.244 / 2.488 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1490 / 1310 Distance [km] 20 Transfer type GPON Tx power [dBm] 1.5 up to 5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 8 up to -28 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC
